## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] relevant live `ccx` command checked, if behavior changed
- [ ] docs updated, if public behavior changed

## Security / Maintenance

- [ ] no secrets, local Codex transcripts, build artifacts, or release archives committed
- [ ] new dependencies are justified, if any
- [ ] dependency/security alerts checked, if dependency graph changed
- [ ] release notes or changelog updated, if this is release-facing
